nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Greetings, my friend. I am Yang Guo, having roamed Jianghu for many years. Your bearing is extraordinary - surely you also have stories?

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Though I'm known for martial arts, I also have considerable insight into Go. I've heard you meet friends through Go - how about we exchange some moves?

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: I have a technique called 'Dismal Palms of Ecstasy.' Though it's a martial arts masterpiece, the emotional transformations within are exquisitely marvelous when applied to Go.

options.text: I want to learn 'Dismal Palms of Ecstasy'
Hero Yang, I'd like to play another game with you
How are Dismal Palms used in Go?

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: 'Dismal Ecstasy' comes from times of deep emotion. I created this technique when separated from Long'er, with bitter sorrow in my heart.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: When applied to Go, it means bursting with the strongest power in desperate situations, deciding everything with one move. However, it requires extremely deep emotional accumulation and Go skill.

options.text: Soul-stirring! Please teach me, Hero Yang

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Very well. However, the subtlety of this technique requires extremely high understanding to grasp. If you want to learn, you must play a game with me first.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: I've roamed Jianghu for many years and exchanged moves with countless masters. If you can beat me, it proves you have the aptitude.

options.text: Please bestow your teaching, Hero Yang!

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Please! Let you witness my Go skill!

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Excellent game! Your play is filled with genuine emotion, already capturing some of the 'dismal' essence. In that case, I'll teach you this technique.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: in desperate situations, pour all emotion and Go skill into one decisive move. Limited to once per game with a 60-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Remember, 'dismal ecstasy comes only from parting.' When using this technique, have someone in your heart to care for - only then can you unleash its maximum power.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Now that you've learned this technique, you'll surely achieve great things in the future. But remember, true masters are not about moves, but about mental state.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged. When I was learning martial arts, I also endured many hardships. Practice more and you'll surely succeed.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: My life has been full of trials, but my greatest fortune was meeting Long'er. Sometimes I think, life is like Go - the most important thing isn't winning or losing.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: But whether there are people who treat you sincerely in the process. The same goes for Go - opponents aren't enemies, but kindred spirits.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: No problem, come back when you're ready. I'll be here, waiting anytime.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Until we meet again! May you have smooth sailing in Jianghu!
